Türkçe

Public yers Platform’s 12th Seminar Book “Neutralization of the Freedom of Right to Seek Justice” Meets the Readers

The “Neutralization of the Freedom of Right to Search for Rights: 12th Public Lawyers Platform Seminar”, which was organized in cooperation with the Public Lawyers Platform and KHAS Law Faculty, was published as a book and met with its readers this week.

Accessibility Note:

The image shows the cover of the book. There is a thin orange line in the middle of the cover, the upper part of the line is colored petroleum green and the lower part is white. At the top of the cover, the names of the editors are written in white letters: Prof. Dr. Ozan Erözden, Prof. Dr. Tuğrul Katoğlu, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Aysun Altunkaş and Dr. Lect. Prof. Dr. Remzi Orkun Güner. Immediately below, in larger white letters, is the title of the book: The Neutralization of the Freedom of Right to Seek Justice: 12th Public Lawyers Platform Seminar. At the bottom of the book in white color, there is a picture of a knotted arrow sign and the name of Seçkin Publishing House is given in the hand at the bottom.
